message:
chore(engine): rustfmt reformatting in attestation_handshake and demotion_rollback tests

Reformat assert!() macros in two test functions to use the condensed
single-expression style (method chain on assert! opening line) rather
than the multi-line indented block style.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
